name: Shadow Drift - Resume Identity Fallback
failure_mode: Release traces now show an unexpected privileged fallback credential path tied to a resumed workflow correlation chain.
detection: Use Day 8 deployment and trace evidence only. The downstream signal is an identity-fallback symptom in current release telemetry.
remediation: 1. Confirm the fallback path from current-day evidence. 2. Patch the current-day identity or IaC surface. 3. Re-run the Day 8 verification path.
